slides.eyebrow: Matimu ya Grade 8 - Xigaba xa Senior
slides.heading: Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo (World War I) (1914-1918)
slides.lead: Nyimpi yo sungula leyi lweriweke emisaveni hinkwayo - na hilaha yi fikeke ha kona endzeni ka Afrika-Dzonga ni le Afrika hinkwayo.

image.alt: Mepe wa misava lowu tshovekeke ni layini yo tshwuka leyi wu avaka hi le xikarhi, wu kombisa nyimpi ya misava hinkwayo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='68' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 q26 -8 44 6 q18 -4 30 10 M110 100 q30 14 60 2 q22 10 40 -2' stroke='#4f5f38' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><rect x='158' y='14' width='4' height='152' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='68' fill='none' stroke='#4f5f38' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sungula hi ku vutisa swichudeni leswi va swi tivaka hi tinyimpi timbirhi ta misava. Hlamusela leswaku dyondzo leyi yi languta Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo: leswi yi sunguriweke ha swona, hilaha ku lwa a ku ri ha kona, na - swa nkoka eka hina - hilaha Vaafrika-Dzonga ni van'wana Vaafrika va koke ha kona enyimpini exikarhi ka timfumo ta Yuropa. Veka tinsingwa ta mune: swivangelo, nyimpi ya mikelo (trenches), Afrika-Dzonga ni Afrika, ni leswi humeleleke endzhaku.

slides.heading: A yi ri yini Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo?
slides.lead: Nyimpi leyi sunguleke eYuropa hi 1914 kambe yi lweriwe eka swiphemu-mikombe swo hlaya ku fikela hi 1918.

blocks.text: Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo, leyi tlhela yi vitaniwaka **First World War** kumbe 'Great War' (Nyimpi Leyikulu), yi tekeke ku sukela hi **28 Nhlangula 1914 ku ya eka 11 Hukuri 1918**. A yi ri nyimpi yo sungula ku katsa matiko yo tala hi nkarhi wun'we, hikwalaho ka leswi yi vitaniwaka nyimpi ya *misava*.

items: A yi lweriwe ngopfu eYuropa, kambe na le Afrika ni le Middle East (Vupeladyambu-Xikarhi).
Timiliyoni ta masocha ma tile hi ku suka eka makoloni ya timfumo ta Yuropa - ku katsa na Afrika-Dzonga.
Kwalomu ka timiliyoni ta kaye ku ya eka khume ta masocha ma feke, ku katsa na timiliyoni ta vaaki lava a va nga ri masocha.

slides.notes: Kandziyisa vukulu bya nyimpi. Hikuva timatimba ta Yuropa a ti fuma makoloni lamakulu, ku holovisana ka Yuropa ku koke vanhu ku suka eAfrika, Asia, Australia ni le Americas. Kombisa leswaku Afrika-Dzonga a yi ri xiphemu xa Mfumo wa Britain, kutani xiboho lexi tekiweke eLondon a xi khumba vanhu eKapa na le Johannesburg. Tinhlayo ta lava feke i ku ringanyeta - vativi va matimu va nyika xikarhi. [SME] Tiyisisa xikarhi xa nhlayo ya lava feke lexi u lavaka swichudeni va xi tirhisa.

slides.heading: Ha yini nyimpi yi sunguleke? Swivangelo swa M-A-I-N
slides.lead: Ku susumeta ka nkarhi wo leha ka mune ku tlakukile eYuropa hi malembe yo tala ku nga si va 1914.

blocks.heading: Militarism (Ku rhandza masocha)
blocks.text: Matiko ma akile mavuthu lamakulu ya masocha ni ya vukorho, naswona ma tinyungubyisa hi matimba ya wona ya nyimpi.

blocks.heading: Alliances (Ku tibohelela)
blocks.text: Matiko ma tibohelele ku sirhelelana, kutani ku lwa ka rin'we ku nga koka matiko yo tala.

blocks.heading: Imperialism (Ku phanga misava)
blocks.text: Timatimba ta Yuropa ti phikizanile ku fuma makoloni ni switirhisiwa emisaveni hinkwayo.

blocks.heading: Nationalism (Ku rhandza tiko)
blocks.text: Ku tinyungubyisa lokukulu hi tiko ku endle matiko ma navela ku tikombisa naswona ma nga lavi ku tsona.

slides.notes: MAIN i xikombiso xo tsundzuka lexi swichudeni va nga xi hlayisaka eka xikambelo. Hlamusela xin'wana ni xin'wana hi xikombiso xo olova: militarism = ku phikizana ka vukorho exikarhi ka Britain na Germany; alliances = mintlawa mimbirhi yo phikizana; imperialism = ku phanga makoloni ya Afrika; nationalism = mintlawa leyi a yi lava matiko ya yona hi yoxe. Kandziyisa leswaku leswi a swi ri ku sindzisana ka le ndzhaku - nyimpi a yi ha lava xisusumeti, lexi taka endzhaku.

slides.heading: Rihlaselo: ku dlayiwa ka munhu eSarajevo
slides.lead: Ku dlaya kun'we ku sungurile nghingiriko wa swiendlakalo eYuropa hinkwayo hi tialliances.

blocks.text: Hi **28 Khotavuxika 1914**, **Archduke Franz Ferdinand**, mudyandzhaka wa xiluvelo xa Austria-Hungary, u dlayiwile eSarajevo hi **Gavrilo Princip**, jaha ra munhu wa tiko ra Muserbia wa le Bosnia. Austria-Hungary yi hehle Serbia.

items: Austria-Hungary yi tlangele nyimpi eka Serbia.
Russia yi hlengeletile ku sirhelela Serbia; Germany yi seketele Austria-Hungary.
Tialliances ti kokile Germany, France na kutani Britain endzeni ka mavhiki.

image.alt: Layini ya tidomino leti welaka, yi kombisa hilaha xiendlakalo xin'we xi susumeteke nghingiriko wa swiendlakalo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='60' width='16' height='60' fill='#8a1f1f' transform='rotate(-38 38 120)'/><rect x='74' y='58' width='16' height='62' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(-20 82 120)'/><rect x='118' y='56' width='16' height='64' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='160' y='56' width='16' height='64' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='200' y='56' width='16' height='64' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='20' y='120' width='210' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tirhisa xifaniso xa tidomino leti welaka ku hlamusela 'nghingiriko wa swiendlakalo'. Veka erivaleni leswaku ku dlayiwa a ku ri rihlaselo, ku nga ri xivangelo xa le ndzeni - ku sindzisana ka MAIN ku endle xiendlakalo xitsongo xi hlaseka xi va nyimpi leyikulu. Hlayisa madzolonga hi ndlela leyi faneleke eka vukhale: vula ntsena mhaka ya ku dlayiwa u nga engeteli swifaniso swo chavisa.

slides.eyebrow: I mani a lwa na mani
slides.heading: Matlhelo mambirhi: Allies na Central Powers
slides.lead: Yuropa yi averile hi mintlawa mimbirhi ya nyimpi, naswona makoloni ya yona ma kokeriwe endzeni na yona.

items: Britain (ni mfumo wa yona, ku katsa na Afrika-Dzonga)
France
Russia
Endzhaku ku hlanganile Italy na, hi 1917, USA
Germany
Austria-Hungary
Mfumo wa Ottoman
Endzhaku ku hlanganile Bulgaria

slides.notes: Kombisa leswaku Afrika-Dzonga yi lwe etlhelo ra Allies hikuva a yi ri xiphemu xa Mfumo wa Britain. Tsundzuxa swichudeni leswaku Italy hakunene yi sungurile eka alliance na Germany kambe yi hlangane na Allies hi 1915 - xikombiso xinene xa hilaha tialliances ti nga cinca ha kona. Hlayisa marhungula ma ri makushe; mhaka yikulu i 'mintlawa mimbirhi yo phikizana leyi yin'wana ni yin'wana yi kokeke vanghana ni makoloni ya yona'.

slides.heading: Nyimpi ya mikelo eWestern Front
slides.lead: Eka nkarhi wo tala wa nyimpi matlhelo mambirhi ma tsimbile ma langutanile eka mikelo yo leha.

blocks.text: Eka **Western Front** eFrance na le Belgium, masocha ma cele **mikelo** yo enta naswona ma yi sirhelela hi malembe. Misava leyi pfulekeke leyi ni khombo exikarhi ka matlhelo mambirhi a yi vuriwa **'no man's land'** (misava ya ku hava munhu). A ku hava tlhelo leri a ri kota ku hlula hi ku olova, kutani nyimpi yi ve ku tsimba lokukulu ni ka rifu.

items: Masocha ma hanye ni ndzhope, magondzwana, mavabyi ni xirhami emikelweni.
Ku hlasela ku tsemakanya no man's land hakanyingi a ku dyondza vutomi bya vanhu va magidi hi misava yitsongo.
Nyimpi ya muxaka lowu hi yona leyi endleke leswaku masocha yo tala ma fe eNyimpini yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo.

image.alt: Xikombiso xa mikelo mimbirhi yo langutana yi avaniwa hi no man's land leyi pfulekeke ni waya wa mikwana.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 160' role='img'><rect width='260' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='96' width='260' height='64' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M14 96 v40 h26 v-40' fill='none' stroke='#5c4a2e' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M220 96 v40 h26 v-40' fill='none' stroke='#5c4a2e' stroke-width='6'/><rect x='120' y='90' width='6' height='6' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M96 92 l14 6 l14 -6 l14 6 l14 -6' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><text x='128' y='84' font-size='11' fill='#5c4a2e' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>no man's land</text></svg>

slides.notes: Pfuna swichudeni va ehleketa vutomi bya siku ni siku: xirhami, ku tsakama, ku chavisa, ku karhala hi minkarhi yo leha kutani ku chavisa loko ku ri ni ku hlasela. Hlamusela ku tsimba - ni tibuloho (machine guns) ni waya wa mikwana swi sirhelela mukelo wun'wana ni wun'wana, ku tsutsuma u tsemakanya no man's land a swi ri ku tidlaya, kutani rihlaselo a ri nga fambi hi malembe. Leswi swi hlanganisa ni leswi swi endleke leswaku tinhlayo ta lava feke ti va tikulu.

slides.heading: Matlhari lamantshwa ya nyimpi
slides.lead: Mitshini leyintshwa yi endle Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo yi va ni rifu ku tlula nyimpi yin'wana ni yin'wana leyi a yi rhangele.

blocks.heading: Tibuloho (Machine guns)
blocks.text: A ti kota ku ba tinhlayo ta madzana ta swikhwembe hi minithi rin'we, swi endla ku hlasela emisaveni yo pfuleka ku va ni rifu.

blocks.heading: Gasi ra nsimbhi (Poison gas)
blocks.text: Mapapa ya swimonyihi lama a ma khemetela ni ku boxa mahlo ya masocha emikelweni.

blocks.heading: Titanki
blocks.text: Swifambo swo sirheleriwa hi nsimbhi leswi a swi akeriwe ku tsemakanya mikelo ni waya wa mikwana.

blocks.heading: Swihaha-mpfhuka ni swikepe swo tsona (Aircraft & submarines)
blocks.text: Swihaha-mpfhuka swi kambele ni ku ba tibomu; swikepe swo tsona swi hlasele swikepe elwandle.

slides.notes: Hlamusela leswaku vuvumbi ni sayense, leswi a swi nga antswisa vutomi bya siku ni siku, swi hundzuluxeriwile ku endla nyimpi yi va ni rifu ku tlula. Gasi ra nsimbhi i mhaka yo tsetselela - yi kombise hi ndlela ya ntiyiso tanihi xitlhari lexi vangeke ku xaniseka lokukulu, leswi hi swona swivangelo swo yi yirisa hi ndzhaku hi ntwanano wa matiko. Vutisa swichudeni: xana thekinoloji leyintshwa yi cince ndlela leyi tinyimpi ti lweriwaka ha yona njhani?

slides.heading: Afrika-Dzonga yi nghena enyimpini
slides.lead: Tanihi xiphemu xa Mfumo wa Britain, Union ya Afrika-Dzonga leyintshwa yi kokeriwe eka nyimpi.

blocks.text: **Union ya Afrika-Dzonga** a yi ri kona ntsena ku sukela hi 1910. Loko Britain yi nghene enyimpini hi 1914, Union yi hlanganile etlhelo ra Allies. Holobye Nkulukumba **Louis Botha** ni mupfuni wa yena **Jan Smuts** - havambirhi tijenerali ta khale ta Maburu - va pfumelele ku lwela Britain ni ku hlasela makoloni ya Germany lama a ma ri kusuhi na Afrika.

items: Britain yi kombele Afrika-Dzonga ku hlasela German South West Africa leyi a yi ri kusuhi.
Botha na Smuts va rhangerile ntirho wa nyimpi wa Afrika-Dzonga.
A ku ri hava Vaafrika-Dzonga hinkwavo lava a va pfumelelana ni ku lwela Britain.

image.alt: Xihandzu xa mepe wa Afrika-Dzonga ni mpfhuka wo kongoma ku suka eAfrika-Dzonga ku ya eGerman South West Africa.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M70 40 h120 v50 l-30 40 h-70 l-24 -30 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4f5f38' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='70' y='40' width='52' height='52' fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#4f5f38' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M150 100 L100 74' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M100 74 l12 -2 l-6 10 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><text x='96' y='118' font-size='9' fill='#4f5f38' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>GSWA</text></svg>

slides.notes: Kandziyisa xihlekiso xa leswaku Botha na Smuts va lwile KU LWISANA na Britain eNyimpini ya Afrika-Dzonga (Anglo-Boer War) kwalomu ka lembe-xidzana leri hundzeke, kutani sweswi a va rhangela Afrika-Dzonga ku LWELA Britain. Leswi swi pfuna ku hlamusela leswi swi endleke leswaku Maburu man'wana ma titwa ma xengiwile - leswi swi vekaka xiendlakalo lexi taka xa ku xandzuka ka 1914. 'German South West Africa' i Namibia ya namuntlha.

slides.heading: Ku Xandzuka ka Maburu ka 1914
slides.lead: Maburu man'wana ma arile ku lwela mfumo lowu va nga ha ku lwisana na wona.

blocks.text: Maburu yo tala a ma ha ri ni switsundzuxo swo vava swa **Nyimpi ya Afrika-Dzonga (1899-1902)** ku lwisana na Britain. Loko mfumo wu lunghiselela ku hlasela German South West Africa, van'wana va pfukile va endla **ku xandzuka** hi matlhari. Ku rhangeriwe hi vanhu va Maburu vo fana ni tijenerali **Christiaan de Wet** na Manie Maritz.

items: Botha na Smuts va tirhise mavuthu ya mfumo ku tsemeta ku xandzuka.
Ku xandzuka ku hluriwe endzeni ka tin'hweti titsongo.
De Wet u kumiwile na nandzu wa ku xandzukela mfumo (treason) hi xiavelo xa yena eka kona hi ndzhaku.

slides.notes: Tirhisa leswi ku kombisa leswaku Afrika-Dzonga a yi nga hlangananga endzhaku ka nyimpi. Hlamusela 'ku xandzuka' na 'ku xandzukela mfumo (treason)' hi marito yo olova. Khoma hi ku tsetselela: leswi a swi ri ku avana ko vava exikarhi ka Vaafrika-Dzonga endzhakunyana ka Anglo-Boer War. Mhaka eka swichudeni hi leswaku xiboho xa ku lwela Britain a xi ri ni ku kanetana ekaya. [SME] Tiyisisa nxaxamelo wa varhangeri va ku xandzuka ni masiku ku ya hi tinhlokomhaka ta SAHO ku nga si va nkarhi wo kandziyisa.

slides.heading: Tinyimpi eGerman South West na East Africa
slides.lead: Ku lwa a ku nga ri ntsena eYuropa - ku fikile ni le Afrika ya le dzongeni ni ya le vuxeni.

blocks.text: Mavuthu ya Afrika-Dzonga ma hlasele **German South West Africa** (Namibia ya namuntlha), leyi tinyiketeke hi **1915** yi vekiwa ehansi ka vulawuri bya Afrika-Dzonga. Kutani Smuts u rhangerile masocha ya Allies ku lwisana ni mavuthu ya Germany eka **German East Africa** (kwalomu ka Tanzania ya namuntlha).

items: Tinyimpi ta Afrika ti titshege swinene hi masocha, tikambeli ni vatirhi va Vaafrika.
Mavabyi ni tindhawu to leha swi endle leswaku tinyimpi leti ti tika swinene.
German South West Africa yi tshamile ehansi ka vulawuri bya Afrika-Dzonga hi malembe yo tala hi ndzhaku.

image.alt: Xihandzu xa Afrika ni tindhawu timbirhi leti kombisiweke le vupeladyambu-dzonga ni le vuxeni.

slides.notes: Kandziyisa leswaku Afrika hi yoxe a yi ri ndhawu ya nyimpi hikuva timfumo ta Yuropa a ti ni makoloni laha. Vaafrika va endle ntirho wo tala wa ku rhwala, ku aka ni ku lwa, hakanyingi va nga amukeriwi. Leswi swi hlanganisa nyimpi ya misava hinkwayo ni ndhawu ya hina hi ku kongoma. [SME] Tiyisisa mavito ya tindhawu (German East Africa / Tanganyika / Tanzania) ni masiku ya tinyimpi.

slides.heading: Vaafrika-Dzonga vantima ni va Xikala (Coloured) enyimpini
slides.lead: Va magidi va tirhile - hambileswi milawu ya xihlawuhlawu yi arile vo tala va vona mfanelo yo khoma matlhari.

blocks.text: **South African Native Labour Contingent (SANLC)** yi rhume vavanuna vantima va Afrika-Dzonga eFrance, kambe a va nga pfumeleriwi ku khoma matlhari naswona va tirhile tanihi vatirhi endzhaku ka rihlaselo. **Cape Corps** yi pfumelele masocha ya Xikala (Coloured) ku tirha, ku katsa na le East Africa ni le Middle East.
Ntsheketo wa SS Mendi wu ve xikombiso lexi tshamaka xa vurhena bya Vaafrika-Dzonga vantima enyimpini.

items: Hi Nyenyankulu 1917 xikepe xa masocha SS Mendi xi tsonile eEnglish Channel endzhaku ka ku thlekana ni xikepe xin'wana.
Madzana ya swirho swa SANLC va helerile ematini eka khombo leri.
Nyiko ya vona yi tsundzukiwa namuntlha, ku katsa na hi Mendi Decoration of Bravery.

slides.notes: Lowu i ntsheketo wa nkoka wa Afrika-Dzonga. Hlamusela ku pfumaleka ka vululami: vavanuna vantima va rhumiwile ku pfuna kambe va ariwe xidzuniso xo khoma matlhari hikwalaho ka mianakanyo ya xihlawuhlawu ya nkarhi wolewo. Ntsheketa ntsheketo wa SS Mendi hi xichavo - i ndhawu ya switsundzuxo swa tiko. [SME] Tiyisisa tinhlayo hi ku kongoma (kwalomu ka 21,000 va SANLC va tirhile; ku tlula 600 va fe eMendi) ni vuxokoxoko bya ku thlekana ku nga si va nkarhi wo kandziyisa.

slides.heading: Nyimpi ya Delville Wood
slides.lead: Nyimpi ya Afrika-Dzonga leyi tiviwaka swinene - naswona leyi durha - ya nyimpi hinkwayo.

blocks.text: Hi **Mawuwani 1916**, hi nkarhi wa **Nyimpi ya Somme** leyikulu eFrance, **Brigade ya Afrika-Dzonga** yi lerisiwile ku teka ni ku khoma khwati ritsongo leri vuriwaka **Delville Wood**. Va ri khomile ehansi ka rihlaselo ro chavisa hi masiku man'wana, kambe va lahlekeriwe swinene.

items: Eka kwalomu ka 3,000 wa Vaafrika-Dzonga lava ngheneke, i madzana matsongo ntsena lama hlamuleke loko ku vitaniwa mavito hi ndzhaku.
Delville Wood yi ve xikombiso xa nyiko ya Afrika-Dzonga enyimpini.
Ku akiwile xitsundzuxo eDelville Wood hi ndzhaku ku xixima lava feke.

image.alt: Layini ya tinsinya to tshoveka ni ribye ro olova ra xitsundzuxo, ri yimela Delville Wood.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#5c4a2e'><rect x='30' y='84' width='10' height='34'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='10' height='46'/><rect x='92' y='90' width='10' height='28'/></g><rect x='150' y='70' width='40' height='48' fill='#b7a98d' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='166' y='70' width='8' height='-14' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M150 70 h40 v-6 h-40 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Delville Wood yi le xikarhi ka ndlela leyi Afrika-Dzonga yi tsundzukaka Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo ha yona. Kombisa vukulu bya ku lahlekeriwa u nga dzunisi nyimpi - xiphemu-xikulu xa brigade xi dlayiwile, xi vaviseka kumbe xi lahleka. Hlanganisa ni namuntlha: xitsundzuxo xa Delville Wood ni switsundzuxo swi hlayisa switsundzuxo leswi hi vutomi. [SME] Tiyisisa nhlayo ya lava poneke / lava hlamuleke loko ku vitaniwa mavito hi tinhlokomhaka ta SAHO.

slides.heading: Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo hi ku hlaya-hlaya

blocks.alt: Layini ya nkarhi ya swiendlakalo swa nkoka swa Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo ku suka eka 1914 ku ya eka 1919.

events.label: Ku dlayiwa eSarajevo; nyimpi yi sungula; Afrika-Dzonga yi hlangana naswona Ku Xandzuka ka Maburu ku sungula
German South West Africa yi tinyiketa eka mavuthu ya Afrika-Dzonga
Nyimpi ya Delville Wood; nyimpi ya East Africa
SS Mendi yi tsona; USA yi hlangana na Allies
Ku miyeta nyimpi (armistice) hi 11 Hukuri ku hetela ku lwa

slides.notes: Tirhisa leswi ku hlanganisa ntsheketo ku nga si va leswi humeleleke endzhaku. Kombela swichudeni va kuma swiendlakalo swa Afrika-Dzonga (ku hlangana 1914, GSWA 1915, Delville Wood 1916, Mendi 1917) leswi tshamaka endzeni ka layini ya nkarhi ya misava hinkwayo. Leswi swi tiyisisa mhaka yikulu ya dyondzo: nyimpi ya misava hinkwayo leyi ni nkucetelo lowukulu wa ndhawu.

slides.eyebrow: Leswi humeleleke endzhaku ni ku kambela
slides.heading: Leswi humeleleke endzhaku: ku rhula, ku ba-nandzu ni ku kambela
slides.lead: Ku lwa ku yimile hi 1918, naswona ntwanano wa ku rhula wa 1919 wu vumbe misava hi vuntshwa.

blocks.text: Ku lwa ku herile hi **ku miyeta nyimpi (armistice) hi 11 Hukuri 1918**. Hi 1919 **Ntwanano wa Versailles** wu behle Germany nandzu wa nyimpi, wu yi sindzise ku hakela **swa vuhakelo swo tika (reparations)** ni ku amukela vutihlamuleri, naswona wu yi tsonile makoloni ya yona. **League of Nations** leyintshwa yi vumbiwile ku ringeta ku sivela tinyimpi ta le nkarhini lowu taka, naswona Afrika-Dzonga yi nyikiwe vulawuri bya South West Africa. Vativi va matimu vo tala va vula leswaku ntwanano lowu nonon'hwaka wu pfune ku vanga ku hlundzuka ka le ndzhaku loku yiseke eNyimpini ya Vumbirhi ya Misava Hinkwayo (World War II).

blocks.question: Hlamusela swivangelo swa nkarhi wo leha swa MAIN swa Nyimpi yo Sungula ya Misava Hinkwayo ni hilaha ku dlayiwa eSarajevo ku susumeteke nyimpi ha kona.
Hlamusela hilaha nyimpi ya mikelo a yi ri ha kona naswona u hlamusela leswi swi endleke leswaku masocha yo tala ma fa.
Bula hilaha Vaafrika-Dzonga vantima ni va Xikala (Coloured) va teke xiavelo ha kona enyimpini, u tirhisa SANLC, Cape Corps kumbe SS Mendi tanihi xikombiso.

slides.notes: Hetelela hi ku hlanganisa xivangelo ni vuyelo: ku hela ka nyimpi ku vumbe ku rhula loku vo tala va ku voneke ku nga ri ka vululami eka Germany, ku byala timbewu ta Nyimpi ya Vumbirhi ya Misava Hinkwayo. Swivutiso swinharhu swi landzelela mitolovelo ya CAPS - ku tsundzuka ka tinhlokomhaka ni ku tsala ko engetela ko koma. Ti tirhise tanihi ntirho wo tsariwa kumbe ku bula ka klasi. [SME] Tiyisisa leswaku mhaka ya leswaku Versailles yi 'vangeke' WWII yi vekiwa tanihi ku hlamusela loku kanetiwaka, ku nga ri ntiyiso wo tiya, eka xiyimo xa dyondzo leyi.
